description: Capability for the main window. F15 (desktop-ipc) added shell:allow-execute, scoped to ONLY the core-sidecar binary (not a general shell-exec grant) -- ping/transcribe in commands.rs are the sole callers. F17 (gui-queue) adds dialog:allow-open -- the native file picker for "Add files"; it only returns paths the user explicitly picked, it cannot read arbitrary files. Both reviewed by .claude/agents/tauri-capability-reviewer.md (ACCEPTANCE G3).
